title: Shopping Basket Split Willow Wicker Hamper kit with Lining includes Cellophane & Bow Buff or White Picnic Storage Gift with Folding Handles (White)
features: Sturdy Construction: These shopping baskets are crafted from split willow, with a removable washable Lining with twin bows either side, ensuring long-lasting use.
Convenient Folding Handles: Equipped with ergonomic handles, these baskets allow for comfortable carrying and transport.
Versatile Usage: Suitable for various purposes, such as Hamper which comes with Cellophane and Pull Bow, Easter, Shopping, Picnics, Farm Shop or Organising Household items.
Lightweight Design: Despite their sturdiness, these baskets are lightweight, making them easy to carry and manoeuvre.
Ample Capacity: With a generous size, these shopping baskets can accommodate a substantial amount of items.
Size 40cm x 30cm x 20cm with Handles laying flat or 31cm with handles in a upright position.
description: Shopping basket / Hamper kit with Folding handles, made from split willow with a removable washable lining includes cellophane & pull bow with instrcutions. These versatile baskets come in two colours, Buff or White, With their sturdy construction and comfortable handles, provide a secure grip, allowing you to distribute weight evenly and prevent strain on your arms and back. Great to use as Hamper and makes a great gift in it's self, for storage around the household. Size 40cm x 30cm x 20cm in height with Handles laying flat or 31cm with handles in a upright position.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Decoration, Farm Shop, Hamper, Picnic, Sewing, Storage, Sturdy, Lightweight
